mapper.select: SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM EXPERIENCE e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.exp_id = #{expId}
SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM EXPERIENCE e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.vol_id = #{volId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM EXPERIENCE e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM EXPERIENCE e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.exp_status = #{expStatus} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM EXPERIENCE e LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON e.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON e.act_id = a.act_id WHERE e.exp_status = 1 ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXPERIENCE(vol_id, act_id, exp_title, exp_content, exp_images) VALUES(#{volId}, #{actId}, #{expTitle}, #{expContent}, #{expImages})
mapper.update: UPDATE EXPERIENCE SET exp_title = #{expTitle}, exp_content = #{expContent}, exp_images = #{expImages} WHERE exp_id = #{expId}
UPDATE EXPERIENCE SET exp_status = #{expStatus}, exp_remark = #{expRemark} WHERE exp_id = #{expId}
UPDATE EXPERIENCE SET exp_views = exp_views + 1 WHERE exp_id = #{expId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPERIENCE WHERE exp_status = #{expStatus}
